Event: Magic Well - March 2025
Event Date: 07/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR234


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Explorer Chest
Stellar Elder Outfit

For the duration of the battle, every 2 sec, the unit fires a magic arrow at the enemy with the highest spell power. On hit, the arrow steals 15% of the target's health, spell power, and physical and magic armor for 4 sec. Stack up to 4 times. Also, the arrow deals magic damage to the target equal to 80% of the armor wearer's spell power. The armor wearer gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to 100% of the damage dealt by the magic arrow. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for up to 4 sec. Stack up to 4 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
